arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sent Marcus Rashford transfer warning amid Manchester United value point
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Thomas Fair, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, views and gossip from Old Trafford amid speculation on Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Monday Night Club: What next for Rashford and Man Utd?
arts.sum: Monday Night Club's Mark Chapman is joined by Chris Sutton, Rory Smith and Steph Houghton to discuss Marcus Rashford's future and whether he should leave Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal teenager Heaven on brink of Man Utd move
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Arsenal's teenage central defender Ayden Heaven.

arts.ttl: Italian clubs target Casemiro & Hojlund - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United duo Casemiro and Rasmus Hojlund attracting interest from Italian clubs, Wolves braced for Matheus Cunha offers, Evan Ferguson can leave Brighton, plus more.

arts.ttl: Man Utd close to signing Lecce left-back Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Lecce and Denmark left-back Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Antony joins Real Betis on loan until end of season
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony joins La Liga side Real Betis on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: 'It's not 40, it's 50!' - Amorim on his age after two months at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is content with his side's win away at Fulham, as he jokes about aging prematurely after after being at the club for two months.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How 'frustrating' Hojlund blunted Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given criticise the performance of Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund in his side's 1-0 Premier League win away at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told to 'shut his mouth' as Sir Jim Ratcliffe action demanded
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has shunned Marcus Rashford for weeks and has been open in his feelings on the forward, but his words have been called out with Manchester United contemplating his sale

arts.ttl: Man United 'enter the race to sign Bayern Munich wonderkid on loan' with Ruben Amorim 'keen to strengthen in attack' this month
arts.sum: The Red Devils have been in the hunt for a world class striker to help bring them back to the pinnacle of European football for a number of years, though they are yet to land on their star No 9.
